languages.text: {n}На лице Эоганна читается великое облегчение.{/n} "{name}, благодарю. Я надеялся, что вы меня поймете, пусть и не рассчитывал на такое щедрое предложение. Я попрошу вас лишь о милосердии — не напоминайте мне о правде. Рано или поздно я вспомню сам. А до этого я предпочту считать, что мой дражайший коллега все еще со мной. Не так ли, Нунциус?"

{n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: {n}На лице Эоганна читается великое облегчение.{/n} "{name}, благодарю. Я надеялся, что вы меня поймете, пусть и не рассчитывал на такое щедрое предложение. Я попрошу вас лишь о милосердии — не напоминайте мне о правде. Рано или поздно я вспомню сам. А до этого я предпочту считать, что мой дражайший коллега все еще со мной. Не так ли, Нунциус?"

I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. {n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"

languages.text: {n}El rostro de Eogunn revela su gran alivio.{/n} «Gracias, {name}. Esperaba que lo entendiera, pero no me atrevía a soñar con una oferta tan generosa. Solo puedo pedirle compasión. No me recuerde la verdad. Tarde o temprano, la recordaré yo mismo. Pero, hasta entonces, prefiero creer que mi querido colega sigue a mi lado. ¿Verdad, Nuncius?».
languages.original_text: {n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro de Eogunn revela su gran alivio.{/n} «Gracias, {name}. Esperaba que lo entendiera, pero no me atrevía a soñar con una oferta tan generosa. Solo puedo pedirle compasión. No me recuerde la verdad. Tarde o temprano, la recordaré yo mismo. Pero, hasta entonces, prefiero creer que mi querido colega sigue a mi lado. ¿Verdad, Nuncius?».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡如释重负。{/n}“感谢您，大人。我虽期盼您的谅解，可并没指望您会如此慷慨。我只求您的仁慈——请不要再向我提及那个真相。迟早有一天，我自己会想起来的。不过在此之前，我宁愿相信，我最亲爱的同僚依然陪在我身边。对不对，努恩修斯？”
languages.original_text: {n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡如释重负。{/n}“感谢您，大人。我虽期盼您的谅解，可并没指望您会如此慷慨。我只求您的仁慈——请不要再向我提及那个真相。迟早有一天，我自己会想起来的。不过在此之前，我宁愿相信，我最亲爱的同僚依然陪在我身边。对不对，努恩修斯？”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn ne cache pas son soulagement.{/n} « Merci infiniment, {name}. J'espérais que vous comprendriez, mais je ne m'attendais à recevoir une offre aussi généreuse. Tout ce que je demande, c'est votre clémence : ne me rappelez pas la vérité. Elle me reviendra à l'esprit tôt ou tard, mais en attendant, je préfère croire que mon très cher collègue est toujours avec moi. N'est-ce pas, Nuncius ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn ne cache pas son soulagement.{/n} « Merci infiniment, {name}. J'espérais que vous comprendriez, mais je ne m'attendais à recevoir une offre aussi généreuse. Tout ce que je demande, c'est votre clémence : ne me rappelez pas la vérité. Elle me reviendra à l'esprit tôt ou tard, mais en attendant, je préfère croire que mon très cher collègue est toujours avec moi. N'est-ce pas, Nuncius ? »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un yüzünde büyük bir rahatlama ifadesi beliriyor.{/n} "Teşekkür ederim. Durumu anlayacağını umsam da bu kadar cömert bir teklif beklemiyordum. Sadece merhamet bekliyorum. Bana gerçeği hatırlatmayın. Er ya da geç kendim hatırlayacağım. Fakat o güne dek pek değerli meslektaşımın hâlâ benimle olduğuna inanmayı tercih ediyorum. Benimle misin Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: {n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un yüzünde büyük bir rahatlama ifadesi beliriyor.{/n} "Teşekkür ederim. Durumu anlayacağını umsam da bu kadar cömert bir teklif beklemiyordum. Sadece merhamet bekliyorum. Bana gerçeği hatırlatmayın. Er ya da geç kendim hatırlayacağım. Fakat o güne dek pek değerli meslektaşımın hâlâ benimle olduğuna inanmayı tercih ediyorum. Benimle misin Nuncius?"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn wirkt ausgesprochen erleichtert.{/n} "{name}, danke. Ich hatte gehofft, Ihr würdet mich verstehen, aber mit einem so großzügigen Angebot hatte ich nicht gerechnet. Ich bitte Euch nur um eine Gnade ... erinnert mich nicht an die Wahrheit. Früher oder später werde ich mich selbst daran erinnern. Aber bis dahin möchte ich glauben, dass mein geschätzter Kollege noch bei mir ist. Ist es nicht so, Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: {n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn wirkt ausgesprochen erleichtert.{/n} "{name}, danke. Ich hatte gehofft, Ihr würdet mich verstehen, aber mit einem so großzügigen Angebot hatte ich nicht gerechnet. Ich bitte Euch nur um eine Gnade ... erinnert mich nicht an die Wahrheit. Früher oder später werde ich mich selbst daran erinnern. Aber bis dahin möchte ich glauben, dass mein geschätzter Kollege noch bei mir ist. Ist es nicht so, Nuncius?"

languages.text: {n}エオガンの顔には大きな安堵が表れている。{/n}「{name} ありがとう。これほど寛大な申し出があるとは思っていませんでしたが、ご理解いただけると思っていました。私はただあなたの慈悲を求めます--私に真実を思い出させないでください。遅かれ早かれ、私自身が思い出すでしょう。しかし、それまでは、私の親愛なる同僚がまだ私と一緒にいると信じたいのです。そうでしょう、ヌンキウス？」
languages.original_text: {n}Great relief shows on Eogunn's face.{/n} "{name}, thank you. I hoped you would understand, though I did not expect such a generous offer. I will only ask for your mercy — do not remind me of the truth. Sooner or later, I will remember it myself. But until then, I prefer to believe that my dearest colleague is still with me. Isn't that so, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンの顔には大きな安堵が表れている。{/n}「{name} ありがとう。これほど寛大な申し出があるとは思っていませんでしたが、ご理解いただけると思っていました。私はただあなたの慈悲を求めます--私に真実を思い出させないでください。遅かれ早かれ、私自身が思い出すでしょう。しかし、それまでは、私の親愛なる同僚がまだ私と一緒にいると信じたいのです。そうでしょう、ヌンキウス？」
